description:
Unlock the power of advanced artificial intelligence in your Bubble app with the Claude AI Integration plugin. Built to connect instantly with Anthropic’s standard Messages API (v1/messages), this plugin allows you to send prompts and receive high-quality, human-like text generation directly within your application's workflows.

Whether you are building a smart chatbot, an automated content generator, or a complex data analysis tool, this plugin makes it easy to communicate with Claude.

Key Features:

Direct API Connection: Securely connects to Anthropic's backend using your standard API key.

Dynamic Inputs: Easily pass dynamic values from your Bubble database or frontend for parameters like the user_message.

Customizable Parameters: Fine-tune your AI responses by defining the specific model (e.g., Claude 3.5 Haiku) and setting max_tokens limits to manage output length and costs.

Workflow Ready: Fully parsed JSON responses allow you to capture Claude's exact text output and use it in your downstream Bubble actions.

Perfect for Building:

Intelligent user-facing chatbots and assistants.

Automated copywriters and summarization tools.

Document analysis and data extraction workflows.
name: Claude AI
